name: Get Leads Deleted from LP after Adding and Merging

content.query:
SELECT [ChannelName]
,[CampaignProduct]
,[CallOrForm]
,[LeadSource]
,[LeadSubSource]
,[LeadSubSourceID]
,[Division]
,[LeadID]
,[CustomerID]
,[DateReceived]
,[CheckOutDate]
,[DateEntered]
,[EntryDate]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,[Product]
,[ProductDescription]
,[Market]
,[DispositionID]
,[Disposition]
,[ApptSet]
,[AppointmentSetDate]
,[AppointmentDate]
,[NetIssued]
,[Sat]
,[Sold]
,[NetSalesAmount]
,[GrossSalesAmount]
,[JobID]
,[JobStatus]
,[JobStatusCategory]
,[JobContractDate]
,[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank]
,[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank]
,[LeadScore_RegressionRank]
,[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy]
,[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount]
,[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue]
,[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy]
,[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount]
,[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue]
,[GCLID]
,[UTMAccount]
,[UTMMedium]
,[UTMSource]
,[UTMCampaign]
,[UTMContent]
,[UTMTerm]
,[PropertyType]
,[LeadDeleted]
,[LeadDeletedReason]
,[SetBy_EmployeeID]
,[SetBy_EmployeeName]
,[SetBy_Email]
 FROM [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_PERF_MKTNG_LEADS]
 WHERE
 DateReceived >= '2023-01-01'
 --and CampaignProduct = 'Coat'
 and Division = 'MAC'
 and LeadDeleted = 'Yes'
 and LeadDeletedReason in ('Added and Deleted from Leads Table', 'Merged and Deleted from Leads Table')
